purpose: No-secret manifest for uploading the Lux Veritas website build package to a private collaborator folder without source zips, local caches, secrets, or internal ecosystem seed materials.
approvalBoundary: This manifest proves the upload package is curated and secret-free. It does not prove the private Drive or private repository upload happened; an internal operations owner must review and complete that external action.

recommendedUploadApproval.approvalLanguage: I approve uploading the curated Lux Veritas Website Build package to a private Drive folder or private internal repository for Arie/collaborator access, using docs/private-upload-manifest.json and docs/upload-checklist.md as the inclusion and exclusion source of truth. Exclude source zips, local caches, secrets, internal ecosystem seed/binder materials, and internal LuxFlow OS app folders.
approvalScope: Upload only the curated website build package listed in requiredPaths and selected optionalGeneratedPaths.
Share only through a private Drive folder or private internal repository with controlled collaborator access.
Keep internal ecosystem seed/binder docs separate unless deliberately shared in a separate private context.
Do not upload source_docs, brief_extracts, zip archives, local caches, .git, node_modules, real .env files, secrets, credentials, or internal LuxFlow OS app folders.
Do not publish this private upload folder as a public website or public GitHub repo.
requiredOperatorProof: Private folder or private repository exists.
docs/arie-quickstart.md, docs/node-z-arie-release-handoff.md, docs/arie-handoff-website-build.md, and docs/upload-checklist.md are present.
data/, functions/, assets/, and required docs/tools are present.
Excluded paths and secret exclusions are absent.
Verification commands pass from a clean local copy after download or clone.
recommendedUploadApproval.closeoutRule: Mark this approval complete only after the private upload is externally confirmed and the required operator proof is recorded outside the public deploy artifact.

postUploadOperatorChecks: Confirm the private folder exists and is access-controlled.
Confirm Arie can access the folder.
Confirm excluded internal seed/binder docs are not in the shared website-build folder unless deliberately shared in a separate private context.
Confirm no secrets, source zips, local caches, or internal LuxFlow OS app folders are present.
Run the verification commands from a clean local copy before continuing site work.
